name: Palak Paneer
recipeInstructions:
This curried spinach dish features paneer, an Indian cheese available in
Indian or ethnic supermarkets. Substitute cubes of firm tofu or 1 cup of
green peas if paneer is unavailable.
Heat oil for deep frying. Fry the cheese cubes until golden brown. Drain on
paper towels. Saute onions in a saucepan or wok with 3 tablespoons of the
oil. Cook the garlic, garam masala, ginger, and chili powder quickly to
"splutter" them. Add the spinach and tomatoes. If using green peas,
mix them in as well.
Lower the heat and cook for 20-30 minutes, until the spinach reduces to a
paste-like consistency. Raise the heat and gently stir until the oil rises
to the surface. Add the cheese or tofu. Cook and serve. Serve 2 portions as
a main dish, or 4 if served alongside other dishes.
